'''Ranste''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|searing]] rock [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[New Plympto system/Legends|New Plympto system]] that occupied the closest [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around its [[Star/Legends|star]], [[Pym|New Plympto]].<ref name="Coruscant" />
